scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @agentaction/shared build && pnpm --filter @agentaction/runtime-core build && pnpm --filter @agentaction/plugin-core build && pnpm --filter @agentaction/provider-core build && pnpm --filter @agentaction/task-engine build
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @agentaction/daemon build && pnpm --filter @agentaction/desktop build && pnpm --filter @agentaction/relay build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @agentaction/daemon typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentaction/desktop typecheck && pnpm --filter @agentaction/relay typecheck
